sqlReaderQuery.value: @concat('SELECT e.city, e.state, e.country FROM ingestion_entities e WHERE e.is_active = 1   AND e.environment = ''',pipeline().parameters.environment,'''   AND NOT EXISTS (         SELECT 1 FROM api_call_registry r         WHERE r.execution_id = ''',pipeline().parameters.execution_id,'''           AND r.environment = ''',pipeline().parameters.environment,'''           AND r.city = e.city           AND r.state = e.state           AND r.country = e.country   ) ORDER BY e.city')

message.value: @concat('Silver transform failed. execution_id=', pipeline().parameters.execution_id, '. Error: ', activity('NB_Silver').error.message)
@concat('Gold step 03_gold_daily_aqi_metrics_iqair failed. execution_id=', pipeline().parameters.execution_id, '. Error: ', activity('NB_Gold_01').error.message)
@concat('Gold step 04_gold_weather_correlation_monthly_iqair failed. execution_id=', pipeline().parameters.execution_id, '. Error: ', activity('NB_Gold_02').error.message)
@concat('Gold step 05_gold_aqi_category_monthly_iqair failed. execution_id=', pipeline().parameters.execution_id, '. Error: ', activity('NB_Gold_03').error.message)
@concat('Main_ETL run completed with one or more failed steps (bronze/silver/gold). execution_id=', pipeline().parameters.execution_id, '. Check pipeline_audit for details.')
